mapper.select:
SELECT i.ITEM_NO AS itemNo, i.ITEM_NAME AS itemName, MIN(op.PRICE) AS price, i.ITEM_STATUS AS itemStatus, img.IMG_URL AS imgUrl, CASE WHEN i.CREATED_DT >= DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 15 DAY), '%Y%m%d') THEN true ELSE false END AS isNew, COUNT(DISTINCT od.ORDER_NO) AS orderCount, COUNT(DISTINCT rv.REVIEW_NO) AS reviewCount FROM ITEM i LEFT JOIN ITEM_OPTION_GROUP og ON og.ITEM_NO = i.ITEM_NO LEFT JOIN ITEM_OPTION op ON op.GROUP_NO = og.GROUP_NO LEFT JOIN ITEM_IMAGES img ON img.ITEM_NO = i.ITEM_NO AND img.PRIMARY_YN = 'Y'
LEFT JOIN ORDER_DETAIL od ON od.ITEM_NO = i.ITEM_NO LEFT JOIN `ORDER` o ON o.ORDER_NO = od.ORDER_NO AND o.ORDER_STATUS = "PAID"
LEFT JOIN ITEM_CATEGORY_MAPPING icm ON icm.ITEM_NO = i.ITEM_NO LEFT JOIN ITEM_REVIEW rv ON rv.ITEM_NO = i.ITEM_NO WHERE i.ITEM_STATUS IN ('ACTIVE', 'INACTIVE') AND i.ITEM_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchWord}, '%')
AND icm.CATEGORY_NO IN
#{no}
GROUP BY i.ITEM_NO, i.ITEM_NAME, i.ITEM_STATUS,img.IMG_URL,i.CREATED_DT
ORDER BY price ASC ORDER BY price DESC ORDER BY orderCount DESC ORDER BY i.CREATED_DT DESC
LIMIT #{size} OFFSET ${(page - 1) * size}

SELECT i.ITEM_NO AS itemNo, i.ITEM_NAME AS itemName, MIN(op.PRICE) AS price, i.ITEM_STATUS AS itemStatus, img.IMG_URL AS imgUrl, COUNT(DISTINCT rv.REVIEW_NO) AS reviewCount, COUNT(DISTINCT od.ORDER_NO) AS orderCount, CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT * FROM ITEM_CATEGORY_MAPPING icm2 WHERE icm2.ITEM_NO = i.ITEM_NO AND icm2.CATEGORY_NO IN
#{no} )
AND i.CREATED_DT >= DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 15 DAY), '%Y%m%d') THEN true ELSE false END AS isNew FROM ITEM i JOIN ITEM_CATEGORY_MAPPING icm ON icm.ITEM_NO = i.ITEM_NO
LEFT JOIN ORDER_DETAIL od ON od.ITEM_NO = i.ITEM_NO LEFT JOIN `ORDER` o ON o.ORDER_NO = od.ORDER_NO AND o.ORDER_STATUS = "PAID"
LEFT JOIN ITEM_OPTION_GROUP og ON og.ITEM_NO = i.ITEM_NO LEFT JOIN ITEM_OPTION op ON op.GROUP_NO = og.GROUP_NO LEFT JOIN ITEM_IMAGES img ON img.ITEM_NO = i.ITEM_NO AND img.PRIMARY_YN = 'Y' LEFT JOIN ITEM_REVIEW rv ON rv.ITEM_NO = i.ITEM_No WHERE i.ITEM_STATUS IN ('ACTIVE', 'INACTIVE')
AND icm.CATEGORY_NO IN
#{cateNo}
GROUP BY i.ITEM_NO, i.ITEM_NAME, i.ITEM_STATUS, img.IMG_URL, i.CREATED_DT
ORDER BY price ASC ORDER BY price DESC ORDER BY orderCount DESC ORDER BY i.CREATED_DT DESC
